params.name: Encyclopedia
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wish Box, Wishing (0.09%)
params.description:
On Apr 8, 2012, the world's largest encyclopedia stopped its print publication. The owners of the Encyclopedia had decided to discontinue the print version, continuing to only provide a digital version moving forward. It was considered to be the most famous reference resource in the world. It was published in Edinburgh, Scotland, two hundred years ago, with entries written by many experts and scholars. Its online version began in 1994 and had more than 100 million users worldwide.
